context: Evaluates whether the AnalyticsManager correctly implements the four tracking methods and persists data in the dual-path file structure (by-date and by-type). This is the observability backbone of capybot, recording command, event, message, and AI analytics.

checklist.name: initialize() creates dirs
checklist.description: `initialize()` is async and creates `data/analytics/by-date/` and `data/analytics/by-type/` directories (with recursive mkdir).

checklist.name: trackCommand implementation
checklist.description: `trackCommand` records an entry with `type: 'command'` and all provided fields (name, userId, guildId, channelId, success, executionTime, options).

checklist.name: trackEvent and trackMessage
checklist.description: `trackEvent` records `type: 'event'` with `eventName` and `metadata`; `trackMessage` records `type: 'message'` with all required fields.

checklist.name: trackAI implementation
checklist.description: `trackAI` records `type: 'ai'` with all AI fields including `promptTokens`, `completionTokens`, `toolCalls`, `generationTime`, `success`, and `reason`.

checklist.name: Dual-path persistence
checklist.description: Each tracked event is written/appended to both the daily date file (`by-date/YYYY-MM-DD.json`) and the type file (`by-type/{type}.json`).
